Video.summary: When Rusty leads Sonia and Ronnie on a wild goose chase, Sonia loses her cool and puts her foot down with Lou.
Video.title: Gypsy Games

Video.summary: The team's work with anger management starts to pay off - with disastrous consequences.
Video.title: T-Bone Trouble

Video.summary: Lou struggles to pick up the pieces after the accident leaves him needing Sonia more than ever.
Video.title: Flame-Thrown for a Loop

Video.summary: Sonia returns, but not before putting the team on probation and laying some ground rules.
Video.title: Probation Abomination

Video.summary: Matt and Sonia take on a fencing coach, but all bets are off when his students go on the offensive.
Video.title: Russian Roulette

Video.summary: Matt and Froy take on a grungy fisherman.
Video.title: Little Froy's Big Mistake

Video.summary: When Matt and Froy go missing, Sonia is on a mission to figure out what they've got up their sleeves.
Video.title: M.I.A. & D.E.A

Video.summary: The Operation Repo team faces a bike-riding gangster and a persistent young debtor.
Video.title: We Are Operation Repo

Video.summary: Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them.
Video.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off

Video.summary: Lou, Lyndah, Matt grab speedboat, truck, trailer, repo rare motorcycle, Froy, Sonia, Lou take forklift.
Video.title: Collectibles

Video.summary: Lou, Froy, Matt face assault charges, repo BMW during film shoot, find debtor's car with assistance.
Video.title: Adult Film Star

Video.summary: Matt and Froy disrupt a couple's tryst, repo a car from a pizzeria, then face challenges at a car graveyard.
Video.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase

Image.alt: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase

Video.summary: Lou orchestrates a truck ambush. Then, they repo a tractor and confront punk kids for four wheelers.
Video.title: Exterminate or Retaliate

Video.summary: Lou orders a Toyota repo post-divorce, has Froy and Matt tail another, and aids a seizing debtor.
Video.title: Unwanted Seizures

Video.summary: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia.
Video.title: Pepper Spray and Guns

Video.summary: First, Sonia, Matt, Froy, and Lou roll up and roll on a gang of brothers to gain possession of an Infinity.
Video.title: Who Wants Ice Cream?

Video.summary: Lou sends Sonia & Froy to repo. Matt & Froy face citizen & cop. Sonia, Lyndah, & Matt confront repo agent.
Video.title: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men

Image.alt: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men

Video.summary: Sonia&Lyndah repo near wig shop. Pepper spray chaos with Lou & Froy. Froy, Sonia, & Lou face thugs for repo.
Video.title: Hairy Situations

Video.summary: Matt, Froy, & Lou repo attorney's car. Froy, Lyndah, & Sonia interrupt scene. Lou & Sonia handle ATVs.
Video.title: Legal Repossession

Video.summary: Sonia and Lou deal with a terrible boss and his instigating employees.
Video.title: Business Issues

Video.summary: A wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber.
Video.title: Wrench in the Works

Video.summary: Matt and Froy get some help from a friendly gardener that lead them to discover a car hidden in the backyard.
Video.title: Hidden Cars and Higher Powers

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill.
Video.title: Rolling Away

Video.summary: Froy & Mike repo at paintball range. Matt intervenes. Sonia & Froy repo sedan. Matt & Lou take risky job.
Video.title: Matt's Back

Video.summary: Lou & Sonia repo from gangsta gals. Matt & Froy dispute with burger-slinger. Sonia & Froy face hustler & crew.
Video.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers

Video.summary: Matt & Froy encounter armed players. Lou & Sonia crash reunion. Lou & Lyndah face unexpected van owners.
Video.title: Strapped on the Court

Video.summary: Lou, Matt, & Froy face owner with blade. Matt & Froy reclaim Prius from role-players.
Video.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy repo a hummer from a bachelorette who is down to party.
Video.title: Suspicious Packages

Video.summary: Matt and Froy are sent on a wild goose chase around L.A for a mini-van.
Video.title: First Class Clown

Video.summary: When Matt almost gets run down by a posse of graffiti-packing gangsters, he sets into motion a plan of revenge
Video.title: Revenge Gone Wrong

Video.summary: After Ronnie suffers a near-fatal wound during an attack on the lot, he reconsiders his role.
Video.title: Smut Campaign

Video.summary: Ronnie's gotten a raise and a promotion, and Carlos's jealousy sends him looking for more appreciation.
Video.title: Warzone at the Worksite

Video.summary: Matt and Ronnie repo a Porsche from a maniac; Carlos and Ronnie come face to face during their repo.
Video.title: A Vengeful Streak

Video.summary: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo, Carlos tries to make amends.
Video.title: Roll the Dice

Video.summary: It's a brand new start for the Operation Repo team when Lou bets big on a high-risk opportunity .
Video.title: Lou's Big Gamble

Video.summary: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed?
Video.title: All In

Video.summary: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude.
Video.title: Viva Las Vegas!

Video.summary: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client.
Video.title: Go Big or Go Home

Video.summary: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks.
Video.title: Bouquets and Blowtorches

Video.summary: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover.
Video.title: Doomsday Prep

Video.summary: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret.
Video.title: Sugardaddy Shakedown

Video.summary: Lou has retired, making Sonia the new boss, but will she be able to keep the company going?
Video.title: The New Boss

Video.summary: Sonia is still struggling to keep the team in line.
Video.title: Bullseye!

Video.summary: Carlos goes undercover at a frat house, but when the party gets the best of him Sonia has to step in.
Video.title: Phi Alpha Fail

Video.summary: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.
Video.title: Boys with Toys

Video.summary: On this special season finale of Operation Repo, the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime!
Video.title: Mile High Mayhem

Video.summary: In this Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars.
Video.title: Reclaim the Plane

Video.summary: Froy and Sonia encounter a city employee who tries to give them the boot.
Video.title: First Rule of Repo

Video.summary: First, Froy and Ronnie dodge tomatoes and pesticides when an organic farmer won't give up his tractor.
Video.title: Natural Liar

Video.summary: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold.
Video.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro

Video.summary: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonia's grasp, sending them on a violent high speed chase.
Video.title: Taken for a Ride

Video.summary: The cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous, comical, and memorable repos of the series.
Video.title: It Ain't No Joke!

Video.summary: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars, and the backlash threatens to end her time.
Video.title: Hayseed Inferno

Video.summary: A hoarder with a secret tries to pull a fast one on Matt and Froy.
Video.title: The Froylan Job

Video.summary: A mischievous magician gets Ronnie and Carlos to stick together when they interrupt his show to grab his car.
Video.title: Tricks and Treats
